pregame_model_read.price_context: Entry captured +152; later board showed +145, producing mild positive CLV.
pregame_model_read.pre_bet_thesis: Bibee 6+ was identified as a price-dislocation edge. The 5+ was overpriced at -143, while 6+ at +152 gave plus-money cushion at the model median.

pitch_notes.sinker: 35 pitches, 1 K, 20% CSW, 57% strike rate; overused and contact-heavy with 8 BBE and 5 hard-hit balls.
pitch_notes.cutter: 19 pitches, 2 K, 44% whiffs per swing, 47% CSW; best strikeout pitch in the outing.
pitch_notes.changeup: 16 pitches, 0 K, 19% CSW; contact-managed but not a putaway weapon.
pitch_notes.curveball: 7 pitches, 1 K, 57% CSW; strong small-sample shape.
pitch_notes.four_seam_fastball: 7 pitches, 0 K, 14% CSW; limited K support and one max-EV contact event.
pitch_notes.sweeper: 6 pitches, 1 K, 50% CSW; useful small-sample support.

model_evaluation.signal_result: process valid, result missed by one strikeout
what_worked: The price-dislocation read was valid: +152 gave meaningful implied-probability cushion and later moved to +145.
Bibee delivered the leash required for the ticket with 6.0 IP and 90 pitches.
Strike efficiency was strong: 69% strike rate and 67% first-pitch strike rate.
CSW reached 30%, keeping the K path alive.
what_failed: Contact suppression failed: 18 BBE, 8 hard-hit balls, and 90.6 avg EV allowed.
Sinker overusage created too many balls in play and not enough strikeout endings.
Cutter/curve/sweeper showed K quality, but usage distribution was not enough to create the sixth strikeout.
The outcome missed by one K, classifying as a hook burn rather than a bad-process miss.
model_evaluation.patch_recommendation: Add SINKER_OVERUSE_K_DAMPENER for Bibee-style profiles when the primary sinker usage projects above 35% and opponent contact quality is moderate/high. Require stronger putaway-pitch usage confidence before attacking 6+ ladders at median.

notes: Bibee's 6+ ticket lost by one strikeout. The process had value due to plus-money pricing and mild CLV, but the model underestimated sinker-driven contact volume and hard-hit leakage. Future Bibee-type 6+ bets should require stronger evidence that cutter/curve/sweeper usage will carry the strikeout pathway.
